trends.topic: FinTradeBench: A Financial Reasoning Benchmark for LLMs
trends.summary: Real-world financial decision-making is a challenging problem that requires reasoning over heterogeneous signals, including company fundamentals derived from regulatory filings and trading signals computed from price dynamics. Recently, with the advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs), financial [金融取引の意思決定支援LLMは、スモールビジネスの投資判断やリスク評価を自動化でき、複雑な財務データの分析を効率化できる]

trends.topic: Nemotron-Cascade 2: Post-Training LLMs with Cascade RL and Multi-Domain On-Policy Distillation
trends.summary: We introduce Nemotron-Cascade 2, an open 30B MoE model with 3B activated parameters that delivers best-in-class reasoning and strong agentic capabilities. Despite its compact size, its mathematical and coding reasoning performance approaches that of frontier open models. It is the second open-weight [30B MoEモデルでありながら3B活性化パラメータという効率性は、リソース限られたスモールビジネスでも利用可能で、コンテンツ生成や業務自動化に活用できる]

trends.topic: OS-Themis: A Scalable Critic Framework for Generalist GUI Rewards
trends.summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has the potential to improve the robustness of GUI agents in stochastic environments, yet training is highly sensitive to the quality of the reward function. Existing reward approaches struggle to achieve both scalability and performance. To address this, we propose OS-Th [GUI操作の自動化フレームワークは、スモールビジネスの反復的な業務プロセス（データ入力、レポート作成等）の完全自動化を実現できる]

trends.topic: Box Maze: A Process-Control Architecture for Reliable LLM Reasoning
trends.summary: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong generative capabilities but remain vulnerable to hallucination and unreliable reasoning under adversarial prompting. Existing safety approaches -- such as reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and output filtering -- primarily operate at th [信頼性の高いLLM推論アーキテクチャは、スモールビジネスのカスタマーサポート自動化やコンテンツ制作における品質保証に重要]

Denoising diffusion models are widely used for high-quality image and video generation. Their performance depends on noise schedules, which define the distribution of noise levels applied during training and the sequence of noise levels traversed during sampling. Noise schedules are typically handcr [高品質な画像・動画生成技術は、スモールビジネスのマーケティングコンテンツ制作コストを大幅削減し、プロ品質の視覚的コンテンツ自動生成を可能にする]
